prompt: Create a player.gd script for a top-down 2D RPG in Godot 4. The player should move in 8 directions using WASD, have a sword attack on mouse click that creates a hitbox in the facing direction, and take damage from enemies with knockback and invincibility frames. Include health management with a max of 6 HP.

assertions.text: Type hints on ALL function signatures (params + return type)
Correct code ordering: signals > enums > constants > exports > vars > onready > lifecycle > methods
Uses @onready for node references (not get_node in _ready)
Uses Input.get_vector() or Input.get_axis() (not raw key checks)
No Godot 3.x syntax (no yield, no undecorated export, no KinematicBody2D)
Incoming damage uses BOTH area_entered AND get_overlapping_areas() polling
